description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a specialized electromyography (EMG) prosthetic hand controller workspace using a Synthetic (algorithmic) 8-channel Cyton session. The workspace must feature a 2-panel layout displaying the Time Series and EMG widgets. Apply a 5-50 Hz Bandpass Filter, disable the Notch Filter, and set the Time Series Vertical Scale to 200 uV. Save a screenshot of the final configuration to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/emg_workspace.png.
